title: Happy Pride Moth!
description: Ever wanted to celebrate pride month, but didn't because there weren't any moths? Here you go!
body:
![](https://modfest.b-cdn.net/pub/1.20/1036_happy_pride_moth.png)
[![mmc-reviews](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/mmcreviews_64h.png?raw=true)](https://mmcreviews.com/all/mods/happy-pride-moth/) [![curseforge](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/curseforge_64h.png?raw=true)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/happy-pride-moth/) [![github](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/github_64h.png?raw=true)](https://github.com/DakotaPride/pride-moths) [![discord](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/discord-plural_64h.png?raw=true)](https://discord.gg/8NkWwu9hgN) [![kinetic_hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57e54853825c80a1ccf03302564e00b3483d7e57.png)](https://www.kinetichosting.net)
[![blanketcon '25](https://github.com/worldwidepixel/badges/blob/main/bc25/featured_in/cozy.svg?raw=true)](https://modfest.net/vanity/bc25)
Available for Fabric & (Neo)Forge! (Should also work on Quilt) Forge is currently only supported on Minecraft 1.20. On MC 1.21 and above, Neoforge is the modloader that's being supported. This mod adds moths - that are pride-themed! If you want to transport these moths to distant lands, don't worry! You can put individual moths in Glass Jars (similar to axolotls with buckets).
![moth-gathering](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/z4CDikCJ/images/571b181bd69dc91cb85eb013dd0215786cab66aa.png)
Q&A How do I get the pride-variants? There are a few ways! You can use [name tags](https://github.com/DakotaPride/pride-moths/wiki/variations#name-tags), [enable via config](https://github.com/DakotaPride/pride-moths/wiki/variations#config), or [find them naturally during Pride Month](https://github.com/DakotaPride/pride-moths/wiki/variations#spawning)! Can I use this in my Modpack/Modified Modpack? Yes, you can! It would be appreciated if the mod were credited on the page itself, but is not required! Will you support 1.X version of Minecraft? Currently, 1.21+ is supported. When later versions of Minecraft are released, efforts will be made to port the mod as swiftly as possible.  What about supporting this mod on X modloader? There is no builtin support for Quilt and currently support for Forge is being discontinued as the mod is ported over to Neoforge. Forge will most likely not return, but I will do my best to support those on 1.20.
Happy Pride Moth! Wiki [Most information regarding this mod can be found here, though some information may be outdated. So take it with a grain of salt!](https://github.com/DakotaPride/pride-moths/wiki)
Additional Kinetic Hosting Information ![https://www.kinetichosting.net](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1075418237925335141/1075581836534751352/HIBERNALHERBS.png)
